message.content:
@startuml
package <<aggregate>> ProductOrder {
    "C" TotalPriceWithoutVAT
    "C" TotalVolume
    "C" BillingAddress
    "E" OrderItem
    "C" Status
    "C" DeliveryAddress
    "E" ProductOrder
    "C" TotalPriceWithVAT
    "C" TotalWeight
}

package <<aggregate>> AGV {
    "C" AGVStatus
    "C" AGVPosition
    "C" Model
    "C" MaxVolumeCapacity
    "C" BriefDescription
    "C" MaxWeightCapacity
    "C" Range
    "E" AGV
    "E" AGVTask
    "C" AGVId
}

entity AGV {
    -state
    "root"
    "E" AGV
    "C" AGVStatus
    "C" AGVPosition
    "C" Model
    "C" MaxVolumeCapacity
    "C" BriefDescription
    "C" MaxWeightCapacity
    "C" Range
    "C" AGVId
    "E" AGVTask
    "V" BriefDescription
    "V" Model
    "V" AGVPosition
    "V" AGVStatus
    "V" AGVId
    "V" MaxWeightCapacity
    "V" MaxVolumeCapacity
    "V" Range
}

entity ProductOrder {
    -numericIdentifier
    -dateOfOrder
    -shipmentMethod
    -paymentMethod
    "root"
    "E" ProductOrder
    "C" TotalPriceWithoutVAT
    "C" TotalVolume
    "C" BillingAddress
    "E" OrderItem
    "C" Status
    "C" DeliveryAddress
    "E" ProductOrder
    "C" TotalPriceWithVAT
    "C" TotalWeight
    "V" TotalPriceWithoutVAT
    "V" TotalVolume
    "V" BillingAddress
    "V" OrderItem
    "V" Status
    "V" DeliveryAddress
    "V" TotalPriceWithVAT
    "V" TotalWeight
    "V" AGVTask
